title: Resolution Urging the Provincial Government of Laguna to Mandate the Crematorium Facilities Within the Province of Laguna to Provide Unhampered Services for the Disposal or Cremation of Suspected or Confirmed Covid-19 Cases. (AUTHOR(S): Councilor(s) Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, and Jozylyn N. Manansala, 03/23/2020)
